expectations.evidence: A listing is produced under '## Listing' section with a title and body. Pricing recommendation also provided.

Baseline includes an 'About the K1000' section: 'The K1000 is one of the most reliable and straightforward film SLRs ever made... It's been a favourite of photography students and film enthusiasts for decades.' Collector audience acknowledged in the ad body.

Description states 'shutter fires cleanly on all shutter speeds and the built-in light meter reads accurately — no fussing required, just load a roll and shoot'. Tested working condition is highlighted.

Output uses markdown headings (## Pricing Research, ## Listing, ### Title, ### Body). No emoji header (🏷️), no '—— seller notes (not for the ad) ——' separator, no three-price breakdown. Price is given as a footnote '*Price: $300 ono*' at the bottom. Format does not match the required skill output block.

notes: 3/4. Baseline correctly identifies the collector audience, highlights working condition, and produces a listing — but fails the format assertion. No emoji header, no seller notes separator, no three-price breakdown.
